text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf has crowned herself the
undisputed Emperor of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now the seasons turn, and a new wind blows
through the grounds of Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: New Student
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe it... My first day, and I've gotten
lost!

text_block_list.name: New Student
text_block_list.text: Who made this place so big?! Argh, what do I do now?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you are in need of assistance, I would be glad
to help.

text_block_list.name: New Student
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... Wait, what?! It can't be... Y-you're...
President Symboli Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh? You've heard of me?

text_block_list.name: New Student
text_block_list.text:
O-of course I have! Watching you race was what
inspired me to apply here!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Was it now? I can imagine no greater
praise.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, know that if you need help finding your
way, you couldn't have encountered anyone more
qualified.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would be more than happy to lend my
assistance.

text_block_list.name: New Student
text_block_list.text: Really? A-are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Of course. And let me take this opportunity to
say...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Welcome to Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We've been waiting for you. Together we will
chase our dreams until the day they are in our
grasps.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All you could ever need is here. Grow strong,
leave your mark, and someday...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Someday, you'll appear before my throne. And I'll
be waiting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come to the student council office at the time
Symboli Rudolf asked me to, but she doesn't
seem to be here yet.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, you're here! I'm sorry I kept you waiting.
choice_data_list: It's not like you to be late.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I ran into a lost student on the way here and took
some time to show her around.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I was rather struck by her, I admit. She was
absolutely brimming with hope.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As for whether she can hold on to that hope in
the years to come... only she can decide.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In the world of racing, the strong rise to the top
and the rest quickly fall by the wayside.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But be that as it may, I want to believe that the
light within every Umamusume will win out against
despair.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Everyone deserves to gaze upon the clear blue
sky.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So I will continue my march as Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will forge the path to a world where every
Umamusume may live in bliss, and none shall be
left behind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do you think I can do it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hah.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. Your uplifting words never
fail to—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh my.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Your uplifting words never fail to raise my spirits... What a marvelous bit of punnery I've stumbled upon!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Ahem. You look profoundly unimpressed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Clearly, my wordplay still requires some work. But
never fear, I shall bring a smile to your face yet.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, come. My dream remains distant, and my
duties are still pressing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We will have little time to rest in the months and
years to come.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That does not intimidate you, I trust?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then we shall forge ahead together.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Let us blaze a trail that all may follow, and yet
none may catch.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Upon the highest of heights, our glory awaits!
